mechanics.excerpt: but do not apply the Attribute threshold modifiers listed for that path and assume the training takes four years] You hate your job ad daydream the hours away (-1 to all skills gained from this path] Standard worker drone [+1 to any one skill] You get raise [Wealth] Hard work pays off with raise and promotion [Wealth (2), Administration +1- Leadership +1] Your dedication gets you noticed by government officials_ who approve you for advanced training (Wealth, Protocol / Affiliation +2; may choose any Higher Education Path next] You become primary interstellar representative for your company [Well Connected (2), Wealth_ Language /Any +1, Negotiation +2, Zero G Operations +1] [Choose one event or roll twice and apply both results] FREE TRADER Though interstellar cartels dominate shipping and trade in the thirty-first century; the independent free trader is nonethe less common sight across the Inner Sphere especially in war-torn or remote areas where larger corporations are reluc tant to operate_ In these regions resourceful person can make serious profit, Tlme: years Attribute Minlmums: CHA Skllls: Zero G Operations +1 Appraisal +2, Negotiation +2, choose one; Fast Talk +2, Interest/ Any +2, Protocol /Any +2, Scrounge +1_ Language Any Next Path: Ne'er-Do-Well (4), Civilian Job (4), Free Trader (4 only if character has the Wealth Trait; takes money t0 make money) COVERT Ops Your nation summons YOU to perform well beyond the call of duty: You will earn significant rewards if you survive The player determines the specific duty covered by this path, rang ing from sabotage ad infiltration to assassination ad fomenting rebellion.
